workshoptitle: DB Security - Oracle Database Security Central (Security Central)

tutorials.title: Introduction: Oracle Database Security Central (Security Central)
tutorials.description: Understand the architecture of this workshop and what it can do

tutorials.title: Lab 1: Initialize Environment
tutorials.description: How to initialize and start all the workshop components

tutorials.title: Lab 2: Access Security Central
tutorials.description: In this lab you will learn how to reset the ranndomly generated password in Security Central

tutorials.title: Lab 3: Assess and Discover
tutorials.description: In this lab you will learn how to Assess and Discover in Security Central

tutorials.title: Lab 4: Audit and Monitor
tutorials.description: In this lab you will learn how to Audit and Monitor in Security Central

tutorials.title: Lab 5: Protect and Prevent
tutorials.description: In this lab you will learn how to Protect and Prevent in Security Central

tutorials.title: Lab 6: Report and Alert
tutorials.description: In this lab you will learn how to Report and set Alerts in Security Central

tutorials.title: Lab 7: Reset the Security Central lab configuration
tutorials.description: In this lab you will reset the Security Central lab configuration

tutorials.title: Need Help?
tutorials.description: Solutions to Common Problems and Directions for Receiving Live Help
